topic: Stop building AI tools, start building AI processes
hook_summary: Everyone's building AI tools. I made $40k by not building a single one.

scenes.audio_text: Everyone's building AI tools. I made $40k last month by not building a single one.
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium close-up of @daniel in a sunlit coffee shop, natural light from window on left, slightly gritty texture, candid documentary style, locked-off camera, shallow depth of field.

scenes.audio_text: I automated one process — client onboarding. Emails, contracts, scheduling. No chatbot, no agent. Just a Zapier sequence that saved me 6 hours a week.
scenes.visual_prompt: Over-shoulder shot of @daniel at a messy desk in a home office, warm desk lamp, papers and monitor visible, slow push-in, natural candid feel.

scenes.audio_text: Founders are competing on systems, not products. Automate the boring stuff first. That's it. That's the whole thing.
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide shot of @daniel walking on a city street at golden hour, confident stride, natural sunlight, shallow depth of field, locked-off camera.
